rationale: Porting custom property support to new URI parser; internal refactor of parser feature, not a spec rule violation.
Test code hardcodes primary port; internal test infrastructure fix, no spec behavior involved.
New URL parser rejects numeric-only database names; connection string spec requires accepting valid db names including numeric ones.
Auth mechanism negotiation workflow broken: saslSupportedMechs handshake required by 4.0 spec not properly sequenced with credentials.
SCRAM-SHA-256 tests misconfigured to run in single mode instead of replica set; internal test bug, not driver behavior.
Internal options validator improvement; no spec rule contradicted, pure implementation refactor.
GridFS uses deprecated internal collection.insert API; internal deprecation warning, not a spec rule violation.
Test runner fails to tear down sharded clusters; CI/test tooling issue, no spec behavior involved.
Implement internal assertArity function for options validation; pure implementation utility, no spec rule.
GridFS upload uses deprecated collection.insert internally; same as NODE-1686, internal deprecation, not spec deviation.
Implementing auth connection string spec tests in the driver; test infrastructure work to add spec test coverage.
Porting auth support to new Topology class; internal refactor/port, not a spec rule violation.
Update Atlas connectivity tests for refactored auth; test update due to internal refactor, not spec deviation.
Auth failure with new URL parser; appears to be a regression/implementation bug in parser, not a named spec rule violation.
Driver overwrites database from URI with authSource; connection string spec requires db and authSource to remain distinct.
DRY refactor of collation wire version check; internal code deduplication, no spec rule violated.
Documentation tutorial shows MongoClient usage incorrectly; docs bug, no spec behavior involved.
Testing deleteMany/updateMany with retryWrites per DRIVERS-574; test infrastructure update for spec test coverage.
Documentation improvement for KerberosServer/KerberosClient properties; pure docs work, no spec behavior.
createIndex silently ignores server errors; error propagation bug, no specific spec rule about createIndex error handling named.
Kerberos module incorrect null check on C string; platform-specific C++ bug in kerberos module, not spec-related.
GSSAPI/Kerberos on Windows requires password but spec says only UPN should be required; contradicts auth spec requirement.
ensureIndex not a true alias for createIndex despite documentation; internal API consistency/deprecation issue, not cross-driver spec.
Sporadic flaky build failures in mongodb-core tests; CI flakiness fix, no spec behavior involved.
Remove circular self-references in js-bson type definitions; internal cleanup/refactor, no spec rule contradicted.
Fully validate and document all operation options; internal API hygiene improvement, no spec rule violated.
BSON deserializer rejects valid 0xFFFD Unicode replacement character; BSON spec requires allowing intentional encoding of this codepoint.
Add Node 10.x LTS to CI test matrix; CI/build infrastructure change, no spec behavior involved.
ObjectID constructor silently accepts multi-byte (>8-bit) characters producing corrupt output; BSON spec requires validation of ObjectId string input.
Suppress noisy warning for missing optional kerberos module; UX improvement, no spec rule involved.
Documentation request to explain useNewUrlParser option; pure docs improvement, no spec behavior.
Integrate options validation framework into driver classes; internal refactoring, no spec rule violated.
Extended JSON non-strict mode should use native JS number for Double; EJSON behavior change, unclear if contradicts a specific spec rule.
Modernize js-bson to ES6 and improve bundling; internal refactor/packaging, no spec rule violated.
Update default tested MongoDB version in Travis CI; CI configuration update, no spec behavior involved.
Add options validation for deprecated findAndModify/findAndRemove; internal API hygiene, no spec rule violated.
New URL parser ignores auth credentials passed via options object; connection string spec requires options-provided auth to be honored.
Auth fails when database omitted from connection string; spec requires defaulting to admin db when no db specified, regression in 3.1.8.
mongodb+srv URI double-encodes credentials; connection string spec requires single-level URI encoding for credentials.
Mongos topology leaks Pool instances on reconnect; memory/resource leak, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Refactor Db to accept client instead of topology; internal architectural refactor, no spec rule involved.
Kerberos module ignores optional defaultDomain parameter; platform-specific kerberos module bug, not a MongoDB spec area.
BSON 4.x cannot deserialize ObjectID serialized by older BSON versions; backward compatibility bug, not a direct spec rule violation.
Description truncated: 'rewrite of SDAM failed to'; insufficient detail to determine if spec rule violated.
Add options validation for GridFS operations; internal API hygiene improvement, no spec rule violated.
Simplify cursor nextFunction to reduce recursive calls; internal refactor for wire protocol rewrite, no spec rule violated.
Replace shallowClone util with Object.assign; trivial code cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Introduce separate WireProtocol.query method to avoid introspection hack; internal refactor, no spec rule contradicted.
Convert WireProtocol to class, remove duplication; internal refactor/cleanup, no spec rule violated.
Refactor WireProtocol.command to take callback; internal API consistency refactor toward OP_MSG support, no spec violation.
